nasb.text: So it was beautiful in its greatness, in the length of its branches; For its roots extended to many waters.

esv.text: It was beautiful in its greatness, in the length of its branches; for its roots went down to abundant waters.

cnv.text: 它樹身高大，枝條長長而顯得秀美， 因為它的根扎在水多的地方。

ccb.text: 它高大美丽，枝干修长， 因为树根深入水源，
